revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:飛鳥田神社]]


== Infobox ==
{{infobox religious building
 | name = Asukata Shrine (Kakamigahara City)
 | native_name = {{ill|Asukata Shrine|ja|飛鳥田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asukata Shrine|1=Asukata Shrine (Kakamigahara City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124481960}}
 | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}
 | image = [[File:Asukada-jinja 01.jpg|300px]]
 | address = {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}} {{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|qid=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City|1=Kakamigahara}}, Sohara Seijūchō 1-105-1
 | coordinates = {{Coord|35|25|34.23|N|136|52|29.99|E|display=inline,title|qq=}}
 | deity = {{ill|Asukata-no-Ōkami|ja|飛鳥田大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asukata-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 
 | type = Formal (Shikinaisha) shrine, formerly a village shrine
 | creation = Traditionally founded in the {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika Era|1=Taika (era)}} (649)
 | main hall = 
 | alternative names = 
 | festival = Third Sunday of March
 | map = {{Location map|Japan Gifu Prefecture|label=飛鳥田神社|float=center|relief=1|width=256|qq=}}
}}
== Overview ==
'''Asukata Shrine''' (飛鳥田神社) is a Shinto shrine in Sohara, Kakamigahara City, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is recognized as one of the formal shrines (式内社) listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} and is traditionally linked to the Suwa faith of the region.
==See Also==
* {{ill|Kami-Goryō Shrine|ja|上御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Goryō Shrine|1=Kamigoryō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11359018}}
